untranslatable_reason: This is a psychology/belief system rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes entry conditions for trading readiness (belief check frequency, journaling depth, victim-mindset tracking) but contains no sizing parameters, risk percentages, multipliers, scaling factors, or position adjustment mechanics. The parameters provided (belief_check_frequency, victim_thought_trigger_threshold, pause_duration_on_violation, required_journaling_depth) are psychological checkpoints and trading pause triggers, not sizing directives.
